props.ChoiceText: Others accepted your word on a dispute because rank is often mistaken for wisdom when spoken clearly enough.
props.ChoiceBio: Judging a matter of honor taught you that confidence and authority are cousins who borrow one another's clothes.

0.TransitionText: Because judging a matter of honor taught you that confidence and authority are cousins who borrow one another's clothes, the matter only confirmed your place among the knightly.
